name: M4A1消音版 | 液化
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. Its dark base and carefully selected red and blue highlights make this custom painted M4A1-S appear as if it's glowing under ambient light. Quiet reflection
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 深色基底与精挑细选的红蓝撞色点缀，使这把M4A1消音版的定制涂装在环境光下宛若发光。 寂静沉思
